binaries.description: Python 3 for running scripts, SQLite 3 for vector database

envVars.description: API keys for embedding and LLM services

network.description: Calls to user-configured LLM and embedding API endpoints

files.description: Memory database, logs, and configuration files

extensions.description: SQLite vector extension for semantic search
extensions.warning: Loads native SQLite extension - verify source before use

cron.description: Maintenance cron configuration provided in maintenance_cron.txt for manual setup
